skills.name: gsd:add-tests

skills.name: gsd:capture

skills.name: gsd:complete-milestone

skills.name: gsd:debug

skills.name: gsd:docs-update

skills.name: gsd:execute-phase

skills.name: gsd:explore

skills.name: gsd:extract-learnings

skills.name: gsd:fast
skills.desc: Execute a trivial task inline — no subagents, no planning overhead

skills.name: gsd:help

skills.name: gsd:import

skills.name: gsd:inbox

skills.name: gsd:ingest-docs

skills.name: gsd:new-project

skills.desc: codebase intelligence | map graphify docs learnings

skills.desc: exploration capture | explore sketch spike spec capture
